sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72904" key="o)lbioergo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀλβιο-εργός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n72904.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">making happy,</tr_> epith. of Dionysus, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.525.16</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
